title: polygala campestris
intro: Polygala campestris, also known as Fieldmilkwort or Common Polygala, is a perennial herb belonging to the Polygalaceae family, native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala campestris are said to include the improvement of immune function, reduction of stress, and potential anti-aging properties. Traditionally, Polygala campestris is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
